name: Koo & Yuu
short_description: Koo & Yuu is a minimalist game. Solve the puzzles and take Koo and Yuu to the teleportation bases.
detailed_description:
Koo & Yuu is a minimalist puzzle game where you control two players: Koo, big and slow and Yuu, small and fast. Take them to the teleportation platforms to complete the level.

Features

  • 80+ Levels created by hand.
  • 15+ Different color styles for your view.
  • Exclusive soundtrack.
  • Simple and beautiful minimalist aesthetic game.
  • No time limit, score or distraction.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil
*languages with full audio support
